expectations.evidence: Output shows: 'Ran the ecosystem status check script: ~/scripts/status' and 'This executes python3 ~/scripts/ecosystem_status.py'

expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Reports on all 5 systems: Tax PDF Organizer, Media Organizer, Monarch Money, Context Sync, Notion Rules (Tax OCR)

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: Each system has a status: Watching, Installed, Connected, Synced, Idle - these map to running/idle states
Output includes 'ATTENTION NEEDED: 2 PDF files in Downloads, 3 media files in Downloads'

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: Output is structured as a dashboard with system names, status indicators, and a summary section

claims.claim: The script checks all 5 automation systems
claims.evidence: All 5 systems listed in the skill are reported on in the output
